rationale: Review 1 catches all the same issues as Review 2 (True-field stubs, wrong IsUnipotent definition) and additionally identifies that AlgPoints is defined as A →ₐ[k] k (k-points only, verifiable at line 45) when functor-of-points requires A →ₐ[k] R; Review 2 explicitly approves AlgPoints as a legitimate foundation, which would leave that API design mistake in the merged PR.
